title: David E Shambach Architect ransomware incident

extortion.description: David E. Shambach, Architect, Inc. [DESA] is a well-respected architecture firm in Tucson, Arizona. Established in 1993 and incorporated in 1994, DESA has continued to expand and develop our abilities in architecture, planning, interior design, project management / administration, sustainability, estimating, and construction. This broad depth of talent, knowledge, and experience enables DESA to successfully create, develop, and manage projects from initial client consultation through design and construction, culminating in functional, sustainable, and dignified buildings and spaces.
